reviews.review_description: Kids had a blast with this. It was a great way to introduce the family to VR gaming and, personally, a nice break from intense games like Pistol Whip. Recommend to folks looking for something to ease into VR or a challenge that doesn’t make you throw a controller.
This game works with real hands to grab the cup and make amazing pyramid towers.

With its accurate and responsive hand-tracking mechanics, Carnival Quest VR excels, enabling players to interact with the carnival theme in a way that feels enjoyable and natural. The virtual environment is seamlessly interacted with in the VR experience. Hand-tracking becomes a fun and essential aspect of this gameplay.
